items.title: Bench Millwork
items.description: Provide built-in millwork benches with incorporated electrical power at the North

items.title: West Restroom Renovation
items.description: Renovate sink areas in existing West Men’s and Women’s restrooms at the North

items.title: Indirect Lighting
items.description: Provide RGB tape light indirect lighting (fixture L14A) at soffits at the North Building

items.title: Skylights
items.description: Provide skylights at the North Building as shown and as specified in Section 086300 -

items.title: Moisture Vapor Emission Control
items.description: Provide Moisture Vapor Emission Control in accordance with Section 090561.13.

items.title: Resilient Tile Flooring
items.description: Provide Resilient Tile Flooring in accordance with Section 096519 and the Finish
